title: Detection of Five Bacterial Pathogens of Rice by Multiplex PCR
author: Martine Bangratz
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bcpaivie

steps.instruction: The amounts described in this protocol are for one sample. Calculate the quantity you need based on your number of sample. Always prepare 10 % more mix.
Prepare a 2% agarose gel. Load 10µl PCR product and perform the electrophoresis at 100 Volts for 90min
Observe the gel under UV light after a ethidium bromide bath
